description: Push Dagster run lifecycle events (SUCCESS / FAILURE) as StatsD/DogStatsD UDP metrics. No external Python deps. Targets the Datadog Agent, local statsd, or any DogStatsD-compatible receiver.

dogstatsd_tags.label: DogStatsD Tags
dogstatsd_tags.description: When true, append |#k:v tag block (Datadog Agent, modern statsd). When false, omit tags (plain statsd protocol).

extra_tags.label: Extra Tags
extra_tags.description: Static tags applied to every metric (e.g. {env: prod, team: data}).

monitor_jobs.label: Monitor Jobs
monitor_jobs.description: If set, only emit for these job names. None = all.
